channel.title: AI English Daily
channel.description: Daily AI news delivered as business English presentations. Curated for data scientists and engineering managers. Practice shadowing, expand vocabulary, master presentation frameworks.
channel.itunes:author: Kenichiro Nishioka
channel.itunes:summary: Daily AI news delivered as business English presentations.

item.title: AI English Daily вАФ 07/06
item.description:
Today's framework: PREP вАФ Point -> Reason -> Example -> Point: state the message, justify it, prove it, and restate the takeaway.
рЯУ∞ Stories covered: вАҐ Business Insider: Meta says its upcoming Watermelon model has caught up with OpenAIвАЩs flagship model вАФ Business Insider reported that Meta AI leader Alexandr Wang told employees an upcoming model, codenamed Watermelon, has matched OpenAIвАЩs GPT-5. вАҐ AI Agent Store: ICML 2026 puts agentic AI at the center of ML research вАФ A daily agent-news roundup said ICML 2026 opens July 6 in Seoul with unusually heavy emphasis on agentic AI workshops, including safety, uncertainty, and governance for autonomous agents. вАҐ Times of India: Anthropic export-control rollback coverage says no government equity stake is planned вАФ Follow-up coverage said the US government lifted export bans on AnthropicвАЩs Fable 5 and Mythos 5 without taking an ownership stake in Anthropic.
вЬ® Featured expressions: strategic calculus, on par with, beholden to (and alternatives in show notes) рЯФС Key terms: frontier model /ЋИfr Мn.t…™r ЋИm…СЋР.d…Щl/, export bans /ЋИek.sp…ФЋРrt b√¶nz/, agentic AI /e…™ЋИd Тen.t…™k ЋМe…™ЋИa…™/
рЯОУ Practice tip: try 0.7x-0.9x playback for shadowing.

item.title: AI English Daily вАФ 07/05
item.description:
Today's framework: What -> So What -> Now What вАФ State the update, explain the business impact, then recommend the next practical move.
рЯУ∞ Stories covered: вАҐ Latent Space: Vercel's Andrew Qu on why agents are a new kind of software вАФ Latent Space interviewed Vercel Chief of Software Andrew Qu about why agents behave like a new form of software and why Vercel built eve around primitives such as skills, sandboxes, resumability, context, and long-running work. вАҐ Mistral AI: Leanstral 1.5: Proof Abundance for All вАФ Mistral released Leanstral 1. вАҐ GitHub Blog: Kimi K2.7 Code is generally available in GitHub Copilot вАФ GitHub made Kimi K2.
вЬ® Featured expressions: moving beyond mere prompt engineering, lowers the barrier to entry, at the point of use (and alternatives in show notes) рЯФС Key terms: AI agents /ЋМe…™ ЋИa…™ ЋИe…™d Т…Щnts/, proof-engineering model /pruЋРf ЋМend Т…ЩЋИn…™r…™≈Л ЋИm…СЋРd…Щl/, formal verification /ЋИf…ФЋРrm…Щl ЋМver…Щf…ЩЋИke…™ Г…Щn/
рЯОУ Practice tip: try 0.7x-0.9x playback for shadowing.

item.title: AI English Daily вАФ 07/04
item.description:
Today's framework: What вЖТ So What вЖТ Now What вАФ State what changed, explain why it matters, then define the next action.
рЯУ∞ Stories covered: вАҐ Anthropic News: More details on Fable 5вАЩs cyber safeguards and our jailbreak framework вАФ Anthropic said Claude Fable 5 has been redeployed globally and published details on stronger cyber safeguards and a jailbreak framework after reviewing a reported bypass with government and industry partners. вАҐ Mistral AI: Leanstral 1.5: Proof Abundance for All вАФ Mistral released Leanstral 1.5, an Apache-2.0 model for Lean 4 proof engineering that reports 6B active parameters, strong benchmark results, and real-world bug discovery across tested repositories. вАҐ xAI News: Introducing the Voice Agent Builder вАФ xAI introduced Voice Agent Builder in beta, a no-code platform for production voice agents with telephony, retrieval, tools, guardrails, MCPs, and observability in one interface. вАҐ GitHub Changelog: Browser tools for GitHub Copilot in VS Code are generally available вАФ GitHub made Copilot browser tools generally available in VS Code, letting agents open pages, click, type, read page content, capture console errors, and take screenshots while preserving user and enterprise controls. вАҐ Latent Space: AIEWF Daily Dispatch: The great loops debate and the state of AI engineering вАФ Latent Space reported Amplify survey findings from AI Engineer WorldвАЩs Fair: 95% of respondents use agents, 89% say agents can write data, and many teams still rely on basic human approvals and permissions as controls.
вЬ® Featured expressions: operational responsibility, part of the runtime architecture, the practical baggage that comes with that shift (and alternatives in show notes) рЯФС Key terms: safety classifier //ЋИse…™fti ЋИkl√¶s…™fa…™…Щr//, formal proof //ЋИf…ФЋРrm…Щl pruЋРf//, speech-to-speech path //spiЋРt Г t…Щ spiЋРt Г p√¶ќЄ//
рЯОУ Practice tip: try 0.7x-0.9x playback for shadowing.

item.title: AI English Daily вАФ 07/03
item.description:
Today's framework: SituationвЖТComplicationвЖТResolution вАФ Set the context, explain the tension, then present the practical resolution.
рЯУ∞ Stories covered: вАҐ OpenAI: Introducing GeneBench-Pro вАФ OpenAI introduced GeneBench-Pro, a research-level benchmark for testing whether AI agents can handle judgment-heavy computational biology analysis on realistic messy datasets. вАҐ OpenAI: How ChatGPT adoption has expanded вАФ OpenAI published Signals consumer data showing ChatGPT adoption accelerating across regions, with especially fast relative growth in Africa and Asia. вАҐ GitHub Blog: GitHub Models is being fully retired on July 30, 2026 вАФ GitHub announced that GitHub Models will be fully retired on July 30, 2026, including the playground, model catalog, inference API, and bring-your-own-key endpoints.
вЬ® Featured expressions: sets the stage for, paint a picture of, grappling with how to (and alternatives in show notes) рЯФС Key terms: computational biology /ЋМk…СЋРmpj…ЩЋИte…™ Г…Щn…Щl ba…™ЋИ…СЋРl…Щd Тi/, benchmark /ЋИbent Гm…СЋРrk/, inference /ЋИ…™nf…Щr…Щns/
рЯОУ Practice tip: try 0.7x-0.9x playback for shadowing.

item.title: AI English Daily вАФ 07/02
item.description:
Today's framework: What вЖТ So What вЖТ Now What вАФ Move from the facts, to their business implications, to the next practical actions.
рЯУ∞ Stories covered: вАҐ Anthropic News: Redeploying Claude Fable 5 вАФ Anthropic said Claude Fable 5 access is being restored globally after export controls were lifted, and described updated safety-classifier work for cybersecurity requests. вАҐ xAI News: Introducing the Voice Agent Builder вАФ xAI announced Voice Agent Builder in beta, a no-code platform for configuring production voice agents on Grok Voice in under two minutes. вАҐ GitHub Changelog: Copilot vision is generally available вАФ GitHub made Copilot vision generally available, allowing users to attach images and PDFs to chat prompts across VS Code, github. вАҐ Cursor Changelog: MCPs and Organizations in Team Marketplaces вАФ Cursor expanded team marketplaces to support Team MCP servers and organization groups, letting admins distribute approved integrations across cloud agents, IDE, CLI, and the agents window. вАҐ Hugging Face Blog: Hugging Face and Cerebras bring Gemma 4 to real-time voice AI вАФ Hugging Face and Cerebras demonstrated an open, cascaded speech-to-speech stack using Gemma 4 and fast inference for real-time voice AI.
вЬ® Featured expressions: the interface is expanding, not a static assumption, close the gap between (and alternatives in show notes) рЯФС Key terms: safety classifier /ЋИse…™fti ЋИkl√¶s…™fa…™…Щr/, voice agent /v…Ф…™s ЋИe…™d Т…Щnt/, no-code /ЋМno К ЋИko Кd/
рЯОУ Practice tip: try 0.7x-0.9x playback for shadowing.

item.title: AI English Daily вАФ 07/01
item.description:
Today's framework: Before вЖТ After вЖТ Bridge вАФ Show the previous state, the new state, and the practical path connecting them.
рЯУ∞ Stories covered: вАҐ Anthropic: Claude Sonnet 5 вАФ Anthropic positioned Sonnet 5 for coding, agentic tasks, and scaled professional work. вАҐ Google AI: Gemini Omni Flash + Flash Lite Image вАФ Google previewed fast video generation and made a low-latency image model GA. вАҐ AWS: Bedrock AgentCore + AG-UI вАФ AWS showed how to build real-time generative interfaces for production agents. вАҐ GitHub: Copilot model and agent updates вАФ GitHub added Sonnet 5 to Copilot and brought Copilot Agent to JetBrains AI Assistant. вАҐ Meta AI: Brain2Qwerty v2 вАФ Meta shared non-invasive brain-to-text research plus code and dataset releases.
вЬ® Featured expressions: the gap is narrowing, packaged closer to where people actually work, raw model benchmarks (and alternatives in show notes) рЯФС Key terms: agentic tasks, multimodal generation, runtime isolation
рЯОУ Practice tip: try 0.7x-0.9x playback for shadowing.

item.title: AI English Daily вАФ 06/30
item.description:
Today's framework: Problem вЖТ Solution вЖТ Impact вАФ Frame the core challenge, explain the response, then make the business impact explicit.
рЯУ∞ Stories covered: вАҐ LangChain: Introducing Dynamic Subagents in Deep Agents вАФ LangChain introduced dynamic subagents, where an agent writes a short orchestration script to launch and coordinate many subagents instead of relying on one tool call at a time. вАҐ Cursor: Cursor Mobile App for iOS вАФ Cursor launched an iOS public beta for paid plans, letting users launch cloud agents, remote-control desktop sessions, receive push notifications, review artifacts, and merge pull requests from a phone. вАҐ Vercel: Build realtime voice agents on AI Gateway вАФ Vercel added audio and voice support to AI Gateway, including realtime voice, text to speech, and speech to text through AI SDK 7. вАҐ OpenAI: How HP is scaling early AI wins across the enterprise вАФ OpenAI says HP will scale its OpenAI Frontier partnership after pilots across customer experience, telemetry, employee productivity, security, and software development showed measurable workflow gains. вАҐ Hugging Face / Ai2: DiScoFormer: One transformer for density and score, across distributions вАФ Ai2 introduced DiScoFormer, a transformer that estimates both density and score for a distribution from data points in a single forward pass without retraining.
вЬ® Featured expressions: The common thread is, Put differently, To put that in context (and alternatives in show notes) рЯФС Key terms: dynamic subagents /da…™ЋИn√¶m…™k ЋИs МbЋМe…™d Т…Щnts/, orchestration /ЋМ…ФЋРrk…ЩЋИstre…™ Г…Щn/, cloud agents /kla Кd ЋИe…™d Т…Щnts/
рЯОУ Practice tip: try 0.7x-0.9x playback for shadowing.

item.title: AI English Daily вАФ 06/29
item.description:
Today's framework: PREP вАФ Point -> Reason -> Example -> Point: state the takeaway, explain why, ground it in evidence, then restate the action-oriented point.
рЯУ∞ Stories covered: вАҐ OpenAI: Previewing GPT-5.6 Sol: a next-generation model вАФ OpenAI began a limited preview of GPT-5.6 Sol, Terra, and Luna, with Sol positioned as the flagship, Terra as the balanced work model, and Luna as the fast, low-cost option. вАҐ OpenAI Deployment Safety Hub: GPT-5.6 Preview System Card вАФ OpenAI published safety and preparedness details for the GPT-5.6 preview, including cyber evaluations, safeguard layers, and benchmark results for Sol, Terra, and Luna. вАҐ Vercel: AI SDK 7 is now available вАФ Vercel released AI SDK 7 with features for building and running production agents, including reasoning control, tool context, MCP Apps support, durable WorkflowAgent runs, sandbox support, telemetry, realtime voice, and video generation. вАҐ DeepLearning.AI The Batch: A New Generation Studies AI, Apple's Recipe for On-Device Models, GLM5.2 Tackles Open-Ended Problems вАФ The Batch covered a fresh set of AI developments including a new generation studying AI, Apple's on-device model recipe, and GLM5.2 work on open-ended problems.
вЬ® Featured expressions: operationally sound, withstand the rigors of real-world operations, security-first mindset (and alternatives in show notes) рЯФС Key terms: frontier models /ЋИfr Мn.t…™r ЋИm…СЋР.d…Щlz/, deployment governance /d…™ЋИpl…Ф…™.m…Щnt ЋИ…° Мv.…Ъ.n…Щns/, sandbox support /ЋИs√¶nd.b…СЋРks s…ЩЋИp…ФЋРrt/
рЯОУ Practice tip: try 0.7x-0.9x playback for shadowing.

item.title: AI English Daily вАФ 06/28
item.description:
Today's framework: What вЖТ So What вЖТ Now What вАФ State what changed, explain the business significance, then turn it into a practical next step.
рЯУ∞ Stories covered: вАҐ OpenAI Developers: Making private MCP servers reachable without making them public вАФ OpenAI described Secure MCP Tunnel, an outbound-only client that lets ChatGPT, Codex, and other OpenAI products reach private MCP servers while the servers remain inside the customer network. вАҐ LangChain Blog: Prompt Caching with Deep Agents вАФ LangChain published guidance on using prompt caching inside Deep Agents so repeated context, instructions, and tool scaffolding can be reused across agent turns. вАҐ The Batch: A New Generation Studies AI, Apple's Recipe for On-Device Models, GLM5.2 Tackles Open-Ended Problems вАФ The Batch covered several AI developments, including GLM5.2 performance on open-ended agentic tasks, Apple research on on-device models, and growing student demand for AI education.
вЬ® Featured expressions: The critical aspect here is, Put differently, a direct pathway to (and alternatives in show notes) рЯФС Key terms: outbound-only client //ЋИa Кt.ba Кnd ЋИo Кn.li ЋИkla…™.…Щnt//, private MCP servers //ЋИpra…™.v…Щt ЋМem siЋР ЋИpiЋР ЋИs…ЭЋР.v…Ъz//, prompt caching //pr…СЋРmpt ЋИk√¶ Г.…™≈Л//
рЯОУ Practice tip: try 0.7x-0.9x playback for shadowing.

item.title: AI English Daily вАФ 06/27
item.description:
Today's framework: PREP вАФ Point вЖТ Reason вЖТ Example вЖТ Point: lead with the takeaway, support it, illustrate it, then land the message again.
рЯУ∞ Stories covered: вАҐ OpenAI: How agents are transforming work вАФ Codex shows agents becoming delegated work, not just chat. вАҐ Google Research: Accelerating Gemini Nano models on Pixel with frozen Multi-Token Prediction вАФ Pixel Gemini Nano gets faster through frozen Multi-Token Prediction. вАҐ AWS Machine Learning Blog: Building agentic AI applications with a modern data mesh strategy on AWS вАФ AWS covers governed data access and Blackwell training optimization. вАҐ AWS Machine Learning Blog: Optimize model training on Amazon SageMaker AI with NVIDIA Blackwell вАФ AWS covers governed data access and Blackwell training optimization. вАҐ LangChain: LangChain Newsletter вАФ Fleet On-Call Copilot, Deep Agents Rubrics, and More вАФ LangSmith updates focus on evals, deployment, monitoring, and production agents.
вЬ® Featured expressions: the unit of work itself, delegated labor, the competitive center (and alternatives in show notes) рЯФС Key terms: agentic AI /ЋМe…™ЋИd Тent…™k ЋМe…™ ЋИa…™/, Multi-Token Prediction /ЋИm Мlti ЋИto Кk…Щn pr…™ЋИd…™k Г…Щn/, drafter head /ЋИdr√¶ft…Щr h…Ыd/
рЯОУ Practice tip: try 0.7x-0.9x playback for shadowing.

item.title: AI English Daily вАФ 06/26
item.description:
Today's framework: SituationвЖТComplicationвЖТResolution вАФ Frame the context, explain the tension, then close with the practical resolution.
рЯУ∞ Stories covered: вАҐ Vercel Blog: AI SDK 7 is now available вАФ Vercel released AI SDK 7 with production-oriented agent features: reasoning control, typed tool context, provider files, skills support, MCP Apps, durable WorkflowAgent runs, approvals, telemetry, voice, and video generation. вАҐ Hugging Face Blog: Run a vLLM Server on HF Jobs in One Command вАФ Hugging Face published a guide showing how to spin up a private, OpenAI-compatible vLLM endpoint on HF Jobs with one command, pay-per-second billing, exposed endpoints, and optional use as a coding-agent backend. вАҐ Hugging Face Blog / Ai2: Which tokens does a hybrid model predict better? вАФ Ai2 compared Olmo 3 and Olmo Hybrid at the token level and found the hybrid model was stronger on meaning-bearing and context-evolving tokens, while transformers stayed stronger at verbatim recall.
вЬ® Featured expressions: the infrastructure around agents becoming more mature, the requirements multiply quickly, the tool lowers the starting cost (and alternatives in show notes) рЯФС Key terms: agent runtime /ЋИe…™d Т…Щnt ЋИr МnЋМta…™m/, tool approval /tuЋРl …ЩЋИpruЋРv…Щl/, connector governance /k…ЩЋИn…Ыkt…Щr ЋИ…° Мv…Щrn…Щns/
рЯОУ Practice tip: try 0.7x-0.9x playback for shadowing.

item.title: AI English Daily вАФ 06/25
item.description:
Today's framework: What -> So What -> Now What вАФ State what changed, explain why it matters, then turn it into practical next steps.
рЯУ∞ Stories covered: вАҐ Mistral AI: Bringing more control over your connectors вАФ Mistral introduced enriched admin controls, connector-scoped API keys, multi-account connectors, a public-preview debugger. вАҐ OpenAI Developers: Mastering Codex Remote for engineering вАФ OpenAI published a field guide for Codex Remote, framing the phone as a control plane for starting, steering, reviewing, a. вАҐ Modal: Introducing Modal Auto Endpoints: Optimized inference you actually own вАФ Modal launched Auto Endpoints, a self-serve way to deploy OpenAI-compatible production inference services for frontier ope. вАҐ Hugging Face / NVIDIA: Accelerating Transformers Fine-Tuning with NVIDIA NeMo AutoModel вАФ Hugging Face and NVIDIA described how NeMo AutoModel builds on Transformers v5 to speed mixture-of-experts fine-tuning wit. вАҐ Hugging Face / IBM Research: Build real agentic apps using CUGA: two dozen working examples on a lightweight harness вАФ IBM Research published two dozen example apps for CUGA, a lightweight agent harness that handles planning, execution loops.
вЬ® Featured expressions: becoming operational systems, the control surface, a workflow discipline (and alternatives in show notes) рЯФС Key terms: control plane //k…ЩnЋИtro Кl ple…™n//, connector-scoped API key //k…ЩЋИn…Ыkt…Щr sko Кpt ЋМe…™ piЋР ЋИa…™ kiЋР//, inference service //ЋИ…™nf…Щr…Щns ЋИs…ЭЋРv…™s//

item.title: AI English Daily вАФ 06/24
item.description:
Today's framework: Before вЖТ After вЖТ Bridge вАФ Contrast the previous working model with the emerging one, then explain the bridge leaders should build next.
рЯУ∞ Stories covered: вАҐ Anthropic: Introducing Claude Tag вАФ Anthropic introduced Claude Tag. вАҐ Mistral AI: Mistral OCR 4: SOTA OCR for Document Intelligence вАФ Mistral released OCR 4 for document intelligence. вАҐ Hugging Face: Shipping huggingface_hub every week with AI, open tools, and a human in the loop вАФ Hugging Face described how it moved huggingface_hub from 4-to-6-week releases to weekly releases using AI. вАҐ GitHub Blog: Copilot CLI: New terminal interface is generally available вАФ GitHub made the redesigned Copilot CLI terminal interface generally available. вАҐ AWS Machine Learning Blog: Build a protein research copilot with Amazon Bedrock AgentCore вАФ AWS published a technical guide for a protein research copilot built with Amazon Bedrock AgentCore and Strands Agents..
вЬ® Featured expressions: operated in a silo, stitching together disparate components, pushing the boundaries (and alternatives in show notes) рЯФС Key terms: document intelligence //ЋИd…СЋРkj…Щm…Щnt …™nЋИtel…™d Т…Щns//, bounding boxes //ЋИba Кnd…™≈Л ЋМb…СЋРks…™z//, human checkpoint //ЋИhjuЋРm…Щn ЋИt Гekp…Ф…™nt//

item.title: AI English Daily вАФ 06/23
item.description:
Today's framework: Problem вЖТ Solution вЖТ Impact вАФ Frame the business pain, explain the proposed response, then make the practical consequence clear.
рЯУ∞ Stories covered: вАҐ OpenAI: Daybreak: Tools for securing every organization in the world вАФ OpenAI expanded Daybreak with an updated Codex Security plugin, GPT-5.5-Cyber, a cyber partner program, and Patch the Planet for open-source maintainers. вАҐ OpenAI: Patch the Planet: a Daybreak initiative to support open source maintainers вАФ OpenAI introduced Patch the Planet with Trail of Bits, HackerOne, and Calif to help maintainers validate and patch vulnerabilities in critical open-source projects. вАҐ Interconnects: GLM-5.2 is the step change for open agents вАФ Interconnects argues that GLM-5.2 is the first open-weight model that feels credible as a general coding agent in real coding harnesses. вАҐ Import AI: Import AI 462: Superpersuasion and self-improving AI вАФ Important policy context, but less directly actionable than todayвАЩs engineering stories.
вЬ® Featured expressions: falls squarely on, the heavy lifting, pricing power (and alternatives in show notes) рЯФС Key terms: vulnerability remediation /ЋМv Мln…Щr…ЩЋИb…™l…Щti r…™ЋМmiЋРdiЋИe…™ Г…Щn/, open-weight model /ЋМo Кp…Щn we…™t ЋИm…СЋРd…Щl/, agentic workflow /e…™ЋИd Тent…™k ЋИw…ЭЋРkflo К/

item.title: AI English Daily вАФ 06/22
item.description:
Today's framework: PREP вАФ State the point, explain the reason, give examples, then restate the point clearly.
рЯУ∞ Stories covered: вАҐ OpenAI: OpenAI to acquire Ona вАФ OpenAI announced plans to acquire Ona, adding secure cloud execution and orchestration technology to Codex so agents can keep working in persistent customer-controlled environments. вАҐ OpenAI: Codex for every role, tool, and workflow вАФ OpenAI introduced role-specific Codex plugins, annotations, and a preview for creating shareable interactive websites and apps from Codex work. вАҐ Vercel: The Agent Stack вАФ Vercel packaged AI SDK, AI Gateway, Workflow SDK, Sandbox, Connect, Chat SDK, and eve as an integrated stack for production-grade agents. вАҐ GitHub Changelog: AI credits consumed per user now in the Copilot usage metrics API вАФ GitHub added per-user AI credit consumption to the Copilot usage metrics API, derived from the same data used in usage-based billing.
вЬ® Featured expressions: The overarching theme is, The practical implication here is, To put that in context (and alternatives in show notes) рЯФС Key terms: persistent environments /p…ЩrЋИs…™st…Щnt …™nЋИva…™r…Щnm…Щnts/, orchestration /ЋМ…ФЋРrk…ЩЋИstre…™ Г…Щn/, governance /ЋИ…° Мv…Щrn…Щns/

item.title: AI English Daily вАФ 06/21
item.description:
Today's framework: SituationвЖТComplicationвЖТResolution вАФ Set the context, explain the tension, then offer a practical way forward.
рЯУ∞ Stories covered: вАҐ AWS Machine Learning Blog: Introducing Web Search on Amazon Bedrock AgentCore вАФ AWS made Web Search on Amazon Bedrock AgentCore generally available, giving agents access to an Amazon-operated web index through AgentCore Gateway. вАҐ Al Jazeera: US export ban on AnthropicвАЩs AI models further strains alliances вАФ The US ordered Anthropic to cut off foreign access to Mythos 5 and Claude Fable 5, and Anthropic took the models offline to comply. вАҐ Latent Space: [AINews] GLM-5.2 is the real deal; Z.ai forecasts Open Fable by EOY вАФ Latent Space reported that GLM-5.2 gained unusually strong practitioner validation and ranked competitively on agentic knowledge-work evaluations while new coding-agent automation primitives also shipped.

item.title: AI English Daily вАФ 06/19
item.description:
Today's framework: SituationвЖТComplicationвЖТResolution вАФ Frame the context, name the tension, and close with the practical path forward.
рЯУ∞ Stories covered: вАҐ GitHub Changelog: Agent finder for GitHub Copilot now available вАФ GitHub launched Agent finder for Copilot, letting users search registries for agents while aligning with a new. вАҐ Cursor Changelog: Improvements to Cursor Automations вАФ Cursor added a /automate skill, Slack emoji triggers, five new GitHub triggers, and default computer-use. вАҐ xAI News: Grok on Databricks вАФ xAI announced that Grok models are natively available on Databricks Agent Bricks as part of the Databricks 2026. вАҐ Vercel Blog: Vercel Ship 2026 recap вАФ Vercel summarized Ship 2026, including demos of a sub-second voice agent built with AI SDK and a mobile QA agent. вАҐ xAI News: Grok for Word вАФ xAI released a Grok add-in for Microsoft Word that can turn notes into documents, bring web research into Word,.

item.title: AI English Daily вАФ 06/18
item.description:
Today's framework: WhatвЖТSo WhatвЖТNow What вАФ State what changed, explain why it matters, then turn it into practical next steps.
рЯУ∞ Stories covered: вАҐ Vercel: Introducing eve вАФ Vercel introduced eve, an open-source framework for building, running, and scaling production agents with durable execution, sandboxes, human approvals, subagents, evals, tracing, and channel adapters built in. вАҐ Vercel: Introducing Vercel Connect вАФ Vercel launched Connect so agents and apps can request scoped runtime tokens for services such as Slack, GitHub, Linear, Notion, Salesforce, Snowflake, Discord, and OAuth MCP servers instead of storing long-lived provider secrets. вАҐ OpenAI: Predicting model behavior before release by simulating deployment вАФ OpenAI described Deployment Simulation, a pre-release risk assessment method that resamples recent deployment conversations, removes the old assistant response, regenerates with a candidate model, and audits the simulated completions. вАҐ xAI: Grok on Amazon Bedrock вАФ xAI announced that Grok 4. вАҐ xAI: Grok Imagine Video 1.5 вАФ xAI made Grok Imagine Video 1.
вЬ® Featured expressions: streamline the building, running, and scaling, enhancing security for integrations, predict model behavior in a live environment (and alternatives in show notes) рЯФС Key terms: durable execution /ЋИd Кr…Щb…Щl ЋМ…Ыks…™ЋИkjuЋР Г…Щn/, scoped runtime tokens /sko Кpt ЋИr МnЋМta…™m ЋИto Кk…Щnz/, Deployment Simulation /d…™ЋИpl…Ф…™m…Щnt ЋМs…™mj…ЩЋИle…™ Г…Щn/

item.title: AI English Daily вАФ 06/17
item.description:
Today's framework: Before вЖТ After вЖТ Bridge вАФ Set the prior state, show what changed, then connect it to what it means going forward.
рЯУ∞ Stories covered: вАҐ OpenAI: Predicting model behavior before release by simulating deployment вАФ Deployment Simulation replays privacy-preserving prior conversations through candidate models before release to estimate undesired behavior. вАҐ Google Cloud: What's new in data agents вАФ new data agents across the Agentic Data Cloud, including Conversational Analytics in BigQuery, make governed data access part of the platform. вАҐ xAI: Use Grok in Warp вАФ Grok models including grok-build-0.1 become usable inside the Warp terminal via X Premium subscriptions. вАҐ Model Context Protocol Blog: The MCP Specification Release Candidate вАФ the release candidate makes the protocol stateless, adds Extensions, Tasks, and MCP Apps, and targets a July 28 final release. вАҐ OpenAI: Introducing new capabilities to GPT-Rosalind вАФ the life-sciences model gains GPT-5.5 agentic coding and stronger drug-discovery intelligence with expanded trusted access.
вЬ® Featured expressions: tempered by significant practical challenges, bogged down by these bespoke integrations, becoming a key distribution layer (and alternatives in show notes) рЯФС Key terms: agentic /e…™ЋИd Т…Ыnt…™k/, stateless /ЋИste…™tl…Щs/, governance /ЋИ…° Мv…Щrn…Щns/

item.title: AI English Daily вАФ 05/31
item.description:

рЯУ∞ Stories covered: вАҐ OpenAI: OpenAI launches the OpenAI Deployment Company to help businesses build around intelligence вАФ OpenAI launched the OpenAI Deployment Company, agreed to acquire Tomoro, and said the new unit will embed Forward Deployed Engineers into organizations to build production AI systems around critical workflows. вАҐ Google Blog: Gemini Intelligence brings proactive AI to Android вАФ At The Android Show 2026, Google introduced Gemini Intelligence, a set of proactive Android AI features intended to automate tasks across apps, generate custom widgets, refine spoken messages, and expand to phones, wearables, cars, glasses, and laptops. вАҐ The Hacker News: OpenAI Launches Daybreak for AI-Powered Vulnerability Detection and Patch Validation вАФ The Hacker News reported that OpenAI launched Daybreak, a cybersecurity initiative for secure code review, threat modeling, vulnerability testing, patch validation, dependency risk analysis, and remediation guidance. вАҐ The Hacker News: Mini Shai-Hulud Worm Compromises TanStack, Mistral AI, Guardrails AI & More Packages вАФ A Mini Shai-Hulud campaign compromised npm and PyPI packages tied to TanStack, UiPath, Mistral AI, OpenSearch, and Guardrails AI, adding credential-stealing malware and IDE persistence hooks.

рЯУ∞ Stories covered: вАҐ Simon Willison: Code w/ Claude 2026: Anthropic launches multi-agent orchestration, Dreaming, and SpaceX Colossus partnership вАФ At Anthropic's Code w/ Claude developer event, the company announced three new features for Claude Managed Agents: multi-agent orchestration to deploy fleets of specialized agents on complex tasks; Outcomes, which lets you define what success looks like so Claude iterates until it gets there; and Dreaming, an overnight mode where Claude replays previous sessions to synthesize new memories and self-generated playbooks. вАҐ OpenAI: How frontier enterprises are building an AI advantage вАФ introducing B2B Signals вАФ OpenAI published the inaugural B2B Signals report, a recurring study of enterprise AI adoption using aggregated, de-identified usage data. вАҐ OpenAI Engineering: Supercomputer networking to accelerate large-scale AI training вАФ OpenAI open-sources MRC вАФ OpenAI released MRC (Multipath Reliable Connection), a novel GPU networking protocol co-developed with AMD, Broadcom, Intel, Microsoft, and NVIDIA, through the Open Compute Project. вАҐ Simon Willison: Vibe coding and agentic engineering are getting closer than I'd like вАФ Simon Willison reflects on a realization from a recent podcast interview: the boundary between vibe coding (generating code without reviewing it) and agentic engineering (using AI tools with full professional rigor) is blurring in his own work.
